import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useSearchParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { TrendingUp, Users, Gamepad2, Calendar, ChevronRight, ArrowUpRight, Clock, Eye, MessageCircle, Share2, Heart, Bookmark, Search, Filter, PiggyBank, Briefcase, Bitcoin, LineChart, UserPlus, Trophy, MapPin, Video, Sparkles, Plus, Globe } from 'lucide-react'; import '../App.css'; import SIPView from './investments/SIPView.jsx'; import MutualFundsView from './investments/MutualFundsView.jsx'; import CryptoView from './investments/CryptoView.jsx'; import BitcoinView from './investments/BitcoinView.jsx'; import OverallTradingView from './investments/OverallTradingView.jsx'; export default function Public() { const [searchParams] = useSearchParams(); const page = searchParams.get('page') || 'news-feed'; // News Feed Component const NewsFeed = () => (
{/* Left Column: Exclusives */}

Exclusive

Global markets rally as inflation data shows unexpected cooling.

47 minutes ago by Sarah Jennings

Exclusive

New banking regulations set to reshape the fintech landscape in 2026.

2 hours ago by Michael Chen

Exclusive

Cryptocurrency volatility continues to spark debate among EU regulators.

4 hours ago by Elena Ross

See more exclusives
{/* Main Column: Featured Image */}
New York, USA Live

Tech giants report record quarterly earnings, driving S&P 500 higher.
{/* Right Column: News List */}
Investment strategies for the post-pandemic economy.

5 minutes ago Investing

Central banks signal potential rate cuts in the coming months.

14 minutes ago Economy

Sustainable investing gains traction among millennial investors.

22 minutes ago ESG

Understanding the impact of geopolitical shifts on currency markets.

37 minutes ago Forex

Center', attendees: [1, 2, 3, 4], gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #FF9A9E 0%, #FECFEF 99%, #FECFEF 100%)', icon: TrendingUp, price: 'Free' }, { title: 'Crypto Trading Strategies Webinar', type: 'Online', date: 'Mar 22, 2026', time: '06:00 PM', location: 'Zoom Meeting', attendees: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6], gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #a18cd1 0%, #fbc2eb 100%)', icon: Bitcoin, price: '$29' }, { title: 'Investment Planning Workshop', type: 'Offline', date: 'Mar 30, 2026', time: '02:00 PM', location: 'Grand Hotel, NYC', attendees: [1, 2, 3], gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #84fab0 0%, #8fd3f4 100%)', icon: PiggyBank, price: 'Free' }, { title: 'DeFi & Web3 Future Summit', type: 'Online', date: 'Apr 05, 2026', time: '09:00 PM', location: 'Live Stream', attendees: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #e0c3fc 0%, #8ec5fc 100%)', icon: Globe, price: '$49' }, { title: 'Real Estate Investing 101', type: 'Offline', date: 'Apr 12, 2026', time: '11:00 AM', location: 'Community Hall', attendees: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7], gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%)', icon: MapPin, price: 'Free' } ]; return (

); }

import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'; import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Plus, Calendar, IndianRupee, Edit2, Trash2, Filter, Search, ChevronDown, Briefcase, Building2, Receipt, Coffee, Home, Smartphone, MoreHorizontal } from 'lucide-react'; import '../App.css'; import './Transactions.css'; import { formatCurrency } from '../lib/formatCurrency'; const StatCard = ({ label, value, subtext, icon: Icon, colorClass }) => (

{label}

{value}

{subtext}

); const Transactions = () => { const [isAddMenuOpen, setIsAddMenuOpen] = useState(false); const menuRef = useRef(null); // Close menu when clicking outside useEffect(() => { const handleClickOutside = (event) => { if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(event.target)) { setIsAddMenuOpen(false); } }; document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside); return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside); }, []); const [transactions] = useState([ { id: 1, type: 'Income', source: 'Salary', amount: 50000, category: 'Employment', date: '2026-01-01', icon: Briefcase }, { id: 2, type: 'Expense', source: 'Rent Payment', amount: 12000, category: 'Housing', date: '2026-01-02', icon: Home }, { id: 3, type: 'Expense', source: 'Starbucks', amount: 450, category: 'Food', date: '2026-01-03', icon: Coffee }, { id: 4, type: 'Income', source: 'Freelance', amount: 8000, category: 'Business', date: '2026-01-05', icon: Building2 }, { id: 5, type: 'Expense', source: 'Mobile Bill', amount: 600, category: 'Utilities', date: '2026-01-10', icon: Smartphone }, ]); const totalIncome = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'Income').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0); const totalExpense = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'Expense').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0); const netBalance = totalIncome - totalExpense; return (
{/* Header */}

Track and manage your financial activity

{/* Add Transaction Menu */}
{isAddMenuOpen && (
)}
{/* Stats Grid */}
{/* Content Area */}
{/* Toolbar */}
{/* Transaction List (Horizontal Tiles) */} {/* Transactions Table (New Layout) */}
List of Transactions
See All
{transactions.map((item, index) => { // Dummy percentage for the 'Rate' column to match reference const percentage = Math.floor(Math.random() * (90 - 20 + 1)) + 20; return ( ); })}
APPLICATION TYPE RATE PROFIT
{/* Logic for checkbox would go here */}
{item.icon ? : }
{item.source}
{item.category}
{percentage}%
{item.type === 'Expense' ? '-' : ''}{formatCurrency(item.amount)}
{/* Pagination */}
Showing {transactions.length} entries
); }; export default Transactions;
